LAST_DONE: 2026-05-15 Phase 7 #2 (Opus 4.7 direct, single-session, ~20K context) — vitest@4 + @vitest/coverage-v8 installed in apps/web; vitest.config.ts (node env, native tsconfigPaths via vitest 4, SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=1, v8 coverage); 5-case auth.register smoke test passing in ~600ms. Squash-merged to main as SHA `81c0279`. Closes Rule 25 TDD deferral from Phase 7 #1. Three lessons captured: (1) drop vite-tsconfig-paths in vitest 4 (native), (2) imports + vi.mock layout — keep imports grouped per import/order, mocks hoist below imports cleanly, (3) Prisma findUnique mock return type — cast with `as never` + inline comment when only narrowed fields are consumed.

PHASE_7_TICKET_2_NOTES:
  - vitest 4 native tsconfigPaths obsoletes vite-tsconfig-paths plugin — saved 1 dep
  - vi.mock placement: imports first (clean import/order lint), mocks second — vitest hoists internally
  - SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=1 in vitest.config test.env unblocks the env.ts module-load schema parse
  - Test pattern for tRPC routers (record for reuse): mock `@yelli/db`, mock `@/server/lib/*` deps, real Zod via `@yelli/shared/schemas`, createCallerFactory(router) + fake Request context
